injuries.comment: The Blues said on Monday (Dec. 29) that Suter will miss at least the next four weeks because of a right ankle injury.
Eichel will join the Golden Knights on their three-game road trip, which begins on Friday (Jan. 2) versus the Blues, according to Jesse Granger of The Athletic.
McNabb did not return after he sustained an upper-body injury in Wednesday's (Dec. 31) game versus the Predators, per Jesse Granger of The Athletic.
